title: Developer spotlight: How Kiro resurrected fax machines for seniors
summary: Robert Willson used Kiro to build Faxi, an AI-powered fax-to-internet bridge enabling offline seniors in Japan to access email, shopping, and online services via fax machines. The talk covers how Kiro shaped development from prototype to production.
